data.title: Robinson Pharma Highlights Key Supplement Manufacturing Trends Shaping 2026
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, on April 29, 2026, Robinson Pharma Inc., a prominent contract manufacturer of dietary supplements based in the USA, discussed important developments influencing the nutraceutical manufacturing sector this year. With the increasing global interest in health and wellness products, the industry is witnessing significant shifts.

data.title: UFP Packaging Expands Upper Midwest Pallet Manufacturing Footprint with Acquisition of Berry Pallets
data.description: A pallet manufacturer based in Waseca, Minn., Berry Pallets, Inc., was acquired this week by UFP Packaging, a division of UFP Industries. The latter, listed on NASDAQ as UFPI, made this announcement from Grand Rapids, Mich., on April 29, 2026. This acquisition extends UFP Packaging's reach in national pallet manufacturing.

data.title: Kaleidescape Strato E Movie Player and Mini Terra Prime Movie Server Honored with 2026 Red Dot Design Award in Product Design
data.description: Today, in Mountain View, California, Kaleidescape, renowned for its exceptional movie library, revealed that their Strato E movie player and Mini Terra Prime movie server system have been honored with the 2026 Red Dot Award for Product Design. This recognition highlights the innovation and excellence of the products in the industry.
US gasoline futures prices jump to highest level since 2022 by more than 5%

data.title: Movie Merch Hits $97.4M Ahead of Summer Blockbusters; Shoppers Choose Essentials Over Toys
data.description: A recent study conducted by Omnisend reveals that 71% of top-selling products are items considered essential for daily use, surpassing the popularity of toys and collectibles. The analysis, which was released from Charleston, South Carolina, on April 29, 2026, highlights that merchandise related to popular movies on Amazon contributed significantly to the market, yielding a revenue of $97.4 million. These movie-related products also achieved a sales volume of 4.48 units, indicating a strong consumer demand for such items.

data.title: Neato Deepens Las Vegas Presence with New Headquarters and Operations Hub
data.description: Today, a 2P ecommerce operator, Neato, revealed its new headquarters and operations hub in Las Vegas. The company, which purchases inventory directly from brands and oversees the online selling process, is solidifying its presence in Southern Nevada with this move. The expanded space signifies Neato's dedication to the region and will play a crucial role as it expands its second-party marketplace model across Amazon and other channels. This development follows closely on the heels of Neato's recent initiatives.

data.title: ONYX Motors Showcases Street-Ready RCR 80V Customs at One Motorcycle Show
data.description: In anticipation of the One Motorcycle Show in Portland from May 1 to 3, ONYX Motors is preparing to exhibit street-ready custom RCR 80V concept bikes created by renowned builders and designers. The showcase will include unique designs such as Bryce Wong's "Pink Panther," Steady Garage's S-56 Outlaw, Ivan Ceja's "Citizen Zero" inspired by Akira, and Tim Seward's '80s themed "Trapper K." These distinct visions aim to wow attendees with their creativity and innovation in the motorcycle world.

data.title: The Wine Group Acquires Phony Negroni® Non-Alcoholic Brand
data.description: A recent acquisition has been made by The Wine Group, with them acquiring the non-alcoholic beverage line Phony Negroni® from St. Agrestis. This move marks a significant development in the beverage industry, with the deal involving a notable number of products being transferred. The acquisition showcases the commitment of The Wine Group to expanding their offerings and catering to a wider range of consumers.

data.title: Bitcoin's surge linked to $7.2B in Michael Saylor's buys, per Bitwise CIO. Read more on the 20% rally.
data.description: Matt Hougan from Bitwise attributes Bitcoin's 20% surge since reaching lows in February to the $7.2 billion in purchases made by Michael Saylor's Strategy. For more information, refer to the complete article.

data.title: Startale's Soneium app, linked to Sony, now has added Privacy Boost for improved user privacy with selective auditability.
data.description: Startale has recently incorporated Privacy Boost into their Soneium app, which is associated with Sony. This integration aims to maintain a balance between user privacy and compliance by enabling selective auditability. The implementation of Privacy Boost within the app signifies a step towards enhancing data protection and ensuring regulatory adherence. The app now offers users increased privacy control while remaining compliant with standards. This update is set to benefit a broad user base, with the app currently boasting a significant number of downloads and active users.

data.title: Disclosure Event to Feature Whistleblower Testimony, New Visual Evidence, and Policy Recommendations
data.description: On May 8, 2026, Dr. Steven Greer, the Founder and President of The Disclosure Project, will be hosting a significant press event at the National Press Club in Washington. This conference commemorates the 25th anniversary of Dr. Greer's groundbreaking briefing in 2001, where he unveiled information regarding military and government involvement in undisclosed projects. This event will be a significant milestone in shedding light on classified information, with an expected attendance of journalists, researchers, and members of the public.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Higher Amid Fed Chair News; This Chip Company Vaults Higher (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decrease in value in anticipation of the Federal Reserve's interest rate announcement and comments by Powell. The stock trading app Robinhood also saw a significant decline. Concurrently, the Nasdaq index saw an increase amidst news regarding the Federal Reserve Chair. Additionally, a chip company experienced a notable surge in its stock value. The overall market trend was captured through live coverage provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Churchill Capital Corp XII Completes Upsized $414 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Churchill Capital Corp XII successfully completed an expanded initial public offering, raising a total of $414,000,000 through the issuance of 41,400,000 units. This figure also includes an additional 5,400,000 units exercised by the underwriters as part of their overallotment option. Each unit was priced at $10.00.

data.title: Max Stock Ltd. to Host First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on May 19, 2026
data.description: An announcement was made by Max Stock Limited (TASE: MAXO) based in Caesarea, Israel, stating their plans to hold a conference call on May 19, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time / 3:00 p.m. IL. The call aims to engage in discussions regarding the Company's financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Chief Financial Officer, Paz Oz, is expected to participate in this event.
